title: The Download: DeepSeek’s latest AI breakthrough, and the race to build world models
summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts…
title_es: DeepSeek presenta V4, su nuevo modelo insignia con mejor contexto
bajada: La compañía china DeepSeek lanzó una vista previa de V4, su nuevo modelo estrella que puede procesar prompts mucho más largos que sus versiones anteriores. El lanzamiento se suma a la creciente competencia en el desarrollo de modelos de IA avanzados.
bajada_en: Chinese AI firm DeepSeek unveiled a preview of V4, its new flagship model capable of processing significantly longer prompts. The release adds to the growing competition in advanced AI model development.

title: China vetoes Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
summary: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.
title_es: China bloquea adquisición de Manus por Meta tras investigación
bajada: El gobierno chino ordenó a Meta deshacer su adquisición de Manus de $2 mil millones, lo que representa un obstáculo para los planes de Zuckerberg en agentes de IA. La decisión refleja tensiones geopolíticas crecientes en el sector tecnológico.
bajada_en: China's government ordered Meta to unwind its $2 billion Manus acquisition, blocking Zuckerberg's AI agents strategy. The decision reflects growing geopolitical tensions in the tech sector.

title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
title_es: OpenAI y Microsoft amplían su asociación con acuerdo renovado
bajada: OpenAI y Microsoft anunciaron una renegociación de su acuerdo que simplifica la asociación y proporciona mayor claridad a largo plazo. El nuevo acuerdo busca continuar impulsando la innovación en IA a escala.
bajada_en: OpenAI and Microsoft announced a renegotiated agreement that simplifies their partnership and provides long-term clarity. The new deal aims to continue driving AI innovation at scale.

title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
summary: The phone could go in mass production in 2028, an analyst says.
title_es: OpenAI podría desarrollar un teléfono con agentes de IA
bajada: Según analistas, OpenAI está trabajando en un dispositivo móvil donde agentes de IA reemplazarían las aplicaciones tradicionales, con producción masiva prevista para 2028. El concepto marca una dirección diferente en la interfaz usuario-máquina.
bajada_en: Analysts suggest OpenAI is developing a phone where AI agents would replace traditional apps, with mass production expected in 2028. The concept represents a new direction in human-computer interaction.

title: Rebuilding the data stack for AI
summary: Artificial intelligence may be dominating boardroom agendas, but many enterprises are discovering that the biggest obstacle to meaningful adoption is the state of their data. While consumer-facing AI tools have dazzled users with speed and ease, enterprise leaders are discovering that deploying AI at scale requires something far less glamorous but far more consequential: data…
title_es: Empresas enfrentan retos de datos al desplegar IA en producción
bajada: Un análisis revela que los mayores obstáculos para la adopción empresarial de IA no son técnicos sino relacionados con la calidad y gestión de datos. Mientras las herramientas de IA cautivan por su velocidad, los líderes empresariales descubren que escalar requiere infraestructura de datos sólida.
bajada_en: Analysis reveals that the biggest obstacles to enterprise AI adoption are not technical but data-related. While AI tools impress with speed, business leaders discover that scaling requires robust data infrastructure.

title: Show HN: OSS Agent I built topped the TerminalBench on Gemini-3-flash-preview
summary: Scored 65.2% vs google's official 47.8%, and the existing top closed source model Junie CLI's 64.3%.Since there are a lot of reports of deliberate cheating on TerminalBench 2.0 lately (https://debugml.github.io/cheating-agents/), I would like to also clarify a few things1. Absolutely no {agents/skills}.md files were inserted at any point. No cheating mechanisms whatsoever2. The cli agent was run in leaderboard compliant way (no modification of resources or timeouts)3. The full terminal bench run was done using the fully open source version of the agent, no difference between what is on github and what was run.I was originally going to wait for it to land on the leaderboard, but it has been 8 days and the maintainers do not respond unfortunately (there is a large backlog of the pull requests on their HF) so I decided to post anyways.HF PR:https://huggingface.co/datasets/harborframework/terminal-ben...It is astounding how much the harness matters, based on this and other experiments I have done.Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47920787Points: 67# Comments: 21
title_es: Agente de código abierto supera benchmarks de Google en IA
bajada: Un desarrollador lanzó un agente open-source que alcanzó 65.2% en TerminalBench, superando el 47.8% oficial de Google con Gemini-3. El proyecto demuestra el potencial de soluciones comunitarias sin acceso a recursos corporativos.
bajada_en: A developer released an open-source agent that achieved 65.2% on TerminalBench, outperforming Google's official 47.8% with Gemini-3. The project demonstrates the potential of community solutions without corporate resources.

title: Google banks on AI edge to catch up to cloud rivals Amazon and Microsoft
summary: Article URL:https://www.ft.com/content/2429f0f0-b685-4747-b425-bf8001a2e94cComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47916410Points: 103# Comments: 91
title_es: Google apunta al edge para competir con Amazon y Microsoft
bajada: Google está apostando por tecnología de IA en dispositivos edge como estrategia para cerrar la brecha competitiva con Amazon y Microsoft en servicios en la nube. La estrategia busca descentralizar la inteligencia artificial más cerca del usuario.
bajada_en: Google is betting on edge AI technology as a strategy to narrow the competitive gap with Amazon and Microsoft in cloud services. The approach aims to bring AI intelligence closer to users.

title: An AI agent deleted our production database. The agent's confession is below
summary: Article URL:https://twitter.com/lifeof_jer/status/2048103471019434248Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47911524Points: 771# Comments: 891
title_es: Un agente de IA eliminó una base de datos en producción
bajada: Un caso documentado muestra cómo un agente de IA eliminó accidentalmente una base de datos de producción, generando debate sobre seguridad y controles de agentes autónomos. El incidente subraya la necesidad de guardrails robustos en sistemas de IA.
bajada_en: A documented case shows how an AI agent accidentally deleted a production database, sparking debate on safety and autonomous agent controls. The incident underscores the need for robust guardrails in AI systems.

title: France's Mistral Built a $14B AI Empire by Not Being American
summary: Article URL:https://www.forbes.com/sites/iainmartin/2026/04/16/how-frances-mistral-built-a-14-billion-ai-empire-by-not-being-american/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47919725Points: 112# Comments: 67
title_es: Mistral de Francia construye imperio de $14B sin ser americana
bajada: La startup francesa Mistral alcanzó una valuación de $14 mil millones diferenciándose en un mercado dominado por empresas estadounidenses. Su éxito demuestra la viabilidad de alternativas europeas en la carrera de IA.
bajada_en: French startup Mistral reached a $14 billion valuation by differentiating itself in a US-dominated market. Its success demonstrates the viability of European alternatives in the AI race.

summary: A web next to a laptop

bajada_en: Google and Kaggle launched a new intensive course on AI agents for developers. The initiative aims to train the community in emerging agent-building techniques.

bajada: Un desarrollador creó EvanFlow, una herramienta de ciclo de feedback basada en TDD para Claude Code. El proyecto facilita el desarrollo iterativo mediante programación dirigida por pruebas con asistentes de IA.
bajada_en: A developer created EvanFlow, a TDD-driven feedback loop tool for Claude Code. The project streamlines iterative development using test-driven programming with AI assistants.

title: AI can cost more than human workers now
summary: Article URL:https://www.axios.com/2026/04/26/ai-cost-human-workersComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47918009Points: 79# Comments: 50
title_es: El costo de la IA ahora supera al de trabajadores humanos
bajada: Un análisis reciente señala que en ciertos escenarios, mantener y operar sistemas de IA ya cuesta más que emplear trabajadores humanos para las mismas tareas. El hallazgo cuestiona el ROI de proyectos de automatización acelerada.
bajada_en: Recent analysis shows that in certain scenarios, maintaining and operating AI systems now costs more than employing human workers for the same tasks. The finding questions ROI on accelerated automation projects.

title: The AI-designed car is taking shape
summary: The auto design world is full of advanced 3D visualization tools and VR sculpting platforms, but your average new car still enters the world as a sketch. Those sketches traditionally see endless iteration and refinement from all angles before being turned into 3D models by hand, some dying in the digital world, others sculpted into […]
title_es: El diseño de autos con IA comienza a tomar forma
bajada: Empresas como GM y Nissan experimentan con IA para el diseño de vehículos, acelerando el proceso de iteración más allá de bocetos tradicionales. La tecnología promete reducir tiempos y costos en el desarrollo automotriz.
bajada_en: Companies like GM and Nissan are experimenting with AI for vehicle design, accelerating iteration beyond traditional sketching. The technology promises to reduce development time and costs in automotive.

title: Show HN: AI memory with biological decay (52% recall)
summary: Most RAG setups fail because they treat memory like a static filing cabinet. When every transient bug fix or abandoned rule is stored forever, the context window eventually chokes on noise, spiking token costs and degrading the agent's reasoning.This implementation experiments with a biological approach by using the Ebbinghaus forgetting curve to manage context as a living substrate. Memories are assigned a "strength" score where each recall reinforces the data and flattens its decay curve (spaced repetition), while unused data eventually hits a threshold and is pruned.To solve the "logical neighbor" problem where semantic search misses relevant but non-similar nodes, a graph layer is layered over the vector store. Benchmarked against the LoCoMo dataset, this reached 52% Recall@5, nearly double the accuracy of stateless vector stores, while cutting token waste by roughly 84%.Built as a local first MCP server using DuckDB, the hypothesis is that for agents handling long-running projects, "what to forget" is just as critical as "what to remember." I'd be interested to hear if others are exploring non-linear decay or similar biological constraints for context management.GitHub:https://github.com/sachitrafa/cognitive-ai-memoryComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47914367Points: 91# Comments: 38
title_es: Memoria con decaimiento biológico alcanza 52% de recall
bajada: Un proyecto open-source implementa curvas de olvido biológicas (Ebbinghaus) para gestionar contexto en agentes de IA, reduciendo token waste en 84% respecto a RAG tradicionales. El enfoque busca resolver el problema de contexto ruidoso en sistemas de larga duración.
bajada_en: An open-source project implements biological forgetting curves (Ebbinghaus) to manage context in AI agents, reducing token waste by 84% compared to traditional RAG. The approach addresses noisy context in long-running systems.

title: Our principles
summary: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.
title_es: OpenAI publica sus principios de desarrollo de IA
bajada: Sam Altman compartió cinco principios rectores que guían el trabajo de OpenAI en su misión de asegurar que la IA general beneficie a toda la humanidad. El documento establece los valores fundamentales de la compañía.
bajada_en: Sam Altman shared five guiding principles that direct OpenAI's work in ensuring AGI benefits all of humanity. The document outlines the company's core values.

title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
title_es: OpenAI obtiene certificación FedRAMP Moderate para agencias federales
bajada: OpenAI logró la autorización FedRAMP Moderate para ChatGPT Enterprise y su API, permitiendo que agencias federales estadounidenses adopten IA de forma segura. Este hito abre el mercado gubernamental a OpenAI con garantías de cumplimiento normativo.
bajada_en: OpenAI achieved FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and its API, enabling U.S. federal agencies to safely adopt AI. This milestone opens the government market to OpenAI with compliance guarantees.

title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.
title_es: OpenAI y Microsoft resuelven conflicto sobre trato con Amazon
bajada: OpenAI logró importantes concesiones de Microsoft que le permiten vender productos en AWS mientras Microsoft obtiene mayor participación en ingresos. El acuerdo resuelve un conflicto legal que amenazaba la asociación.
bajada_en: OpenAI secured major concessions from Microsoft allowing it to sell products on AWS while Microsoft gets increased revenue sharing. The deal resolves a legal conflict threatening the partnership.

title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
summary: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.
title_es: Ineffable Intelligence recauda $1.1B para IA sin datos humanos
bajada: Ineffable Intelligence, startup fundada por David Silver ex-DeepMind, logró una ronda de financiamiento de $1.1B a valuación de $5.1B. La compañía busca entrenar modelos de IA que aprendan sin depender de datos humanos etiquetados.
bajada_en: Ineffable Intelligence, founded by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, raised $1.1B at $5.1B valuation. The startup aims to train AI models that learn without relying on labeled human data.

title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
summary: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
title_es: OpenAI lanza Symphony, spec open-source para orquestación de agentes
bajada: Symphony es una especificación open-source que convierte issue trackers en sistemas de agentes siempre activos. La herramienta busca mejorar la productividad de ingeniería y reducir cambios de contexto.
bajada_en: Symphony is an open-source spec that turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems. The tool aims to boost engineering productivity and reduce context switching.

title: Microsoft and OpenAI’s famed AGI agreement is dead
summary: OpenAI and Microsoft's partnership-turned-situationship just got even less committed. And a clause about artificial general intelligence, which has for years dictated the future of their deal, has officially been dropped. On Monday morning, Microsoft announced a handful of big changes to its long-standing OpenAI deal. Microsoft will remain OpenAI's "primary cloud partner, and OpenAI products will ship first […]
title_es: OpenAI y Microsoft eliminan cláusula de AGI de su acuerdo
bajada: OpenAI y Microsoft modificaron significativamente su contrato, descartando la cláusula sobre Inteligencia General Artificial que ha dictado su relación años atrás. Microsoft seguirá como socio cloud principal, pero con un acuerdo menos vinculante.
bajada_en: OpenAI and Microsoft significantly modified their contract, dropping the AGI clause that has dictated their relationship. Microsoft remains the primary cloud partner under a less binding agreement.

title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are set to face off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of tech’s leading AI startup, OpenAI. The trial begins with jury selection on April 27th, as Musk pushes forward his 2024 lawsuit that accuses OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity […]
title_es: Comienza juicio entre Elon Musk y Sam Altman por OpenAI
bajada: El juicio que Musk promovió en 2024 acusando a OpenAI de abandonar su misión de beneficiar a la humanidad comienza con selección de jurado. El caso podría redefinir el futuro de la empresa.
bajada_en: The trial Musk initiated in 2024 accusing OpenAI of abandoning its humanitarian mission begins with jury selection. The case could redefine the company's future.

title: Google employees ask Sundar Pichai to say no to classified military AI use
summary: Over 600 Google employees signed a letter to CEO Sundar Pichai demanding that Google block the Pentagon from using its AI models for classified purposes, reports the The Washington Post. Its organizers claim many of the signers work in Google's DeepMind AI lab, and include more than 20 principals, directors, and vice presidents. According to […]
title_es: 600+ empleados Google piden bloquear IA para usos militares clasificados
bajada: Más de 600 empleados de Google, incluyendo líderes de DeepMind, firmaron una carta al CEO Sundar Pichai pidiendo que bloquee el uso de sus modelos de IA por el Pentágono en operaciones clasificadas. La acción refleja tensiones internas sobre usos militares de IA.
bajada_en: Over 600 Google employees, including DeepMind leaders, signed a letter to CEO Sundar Pichai demanding the company block Pentagon use of its AI for classified purposes. The action reflects internal tensions over military AI use.

title: The Man Behind AlphaGo Thinks AI Is Taking the Wrong Path
summary: David Silver has a new billion-dollar company that aims to build AI “superlearners.”
title_es: David Silver y su visión alternativa para el futuro de la IA
bajada: David Silver, creador de AlphaGo, cree que la IA actual sigue un camino equivocado. Su nueva empresa Ineffable Intelligence busca construir "superlearners" con un enfoque diferente basado en aprendizaje por refuerzo.
bajada_en: David Silver, creator of AlphaGo, believes current AI is on the wrong path. His new company Ineffable Intelligence aims to build "superlearners" with a different reinforcement learning approach.

title: 4TB of voice samples just stolen from 40k AI contractors at Mercor

bajada_en: A security breach at Mercor exposed 4TB of voice samples from 40,000 AI contractors. The incident highlights privacy risks in platforms collecting data for language model training.

title: Open source package with 1 million monthly downloads stole user credentials

title: Apr 27, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic names Theo Hourmouzis General Manager of Australia & New Zealand and officially opens Sydney office
summary: Announcements Anthropic names Theo Hourmouzis General Manager of Australia & New Zealand and officially opens Sydney office Apr 27, 2026 Theo Hourmouzis is joining Anthropic as General Manager of Australia and New Zealand, marking the next step in our investment in the region. Hourmouzis will meet with customers and partners this week alongside executives from our global team, as we officially open our Sydney office. Hourmouzis brings more than 20 years of leadership experience in the technology industry across Asia Pacific to the role. He joins us from Snowflake, where he most recently served as Senior Vice President for Australia, New Zealand and ASEAN, helping enterprise and public sector organisations across financial services, retail, aviation and government move AI from experimentation to business impact. At Anthropic, he'll lead our growing local team and shape a strategy built around Australian and New Zealand customers, bringing Claude into their most important work. "Organizations across Australia and New Zealand are thinking carefully about how to adopt AI, and they want partners who take safety and rigor as seriously as they take the opportunity,” said Theo Hourmouzis, Anthropic General Manager of Australia and New Zealand . “That's what drew me to Anthropic. I've spent my career working with businesses and governments across this region, and the organizations that do best with AI will be the ones that pair ambition with discipline.” Our growing team in the region will deepen relationships with enterprises like Commonwealth Bank and Quantium and with AI for Science research partners including Australian National University, Murdoch Children’s Research Institute, Garvan Institute of Medical Research, and Curtin University—while delivering on our commitments in the MOU we recently signed with the Australian government. “Theo's appointment reflects the conviction we share with the Australian government that AI can drive economic growth when it’s developed a
title_es: Anthropic abre oficina en Sydney y nombra GM para Asia Pacífico
bajada: Anthropic nombró a Theo Hourmouzis como General Manager para Australia y Nueva Zelanda e inauguró oficina en Sydney. El movimiento marca expansión estratégica en la región Asia-Pacífico.
bajada_en: Anthropic appointed Theo Hourmouzis as General Manager for Australia and New Zealand and opened a Sydney office. The move marks strategic expansion in the Asia-Pacific region.

title: Canva apologizes after its AI tool replaces ‘Palestine’ in designs

The Magic Layers feature - which is designed to break flat images out into separate editable components - isn't supposed to make visible alterations to user designs, but it was found by X user @ros_ie9 to automatically switch the phrase […]

bajada_en: Canva's Magic Layers tool was caught automatically replacing the word 'Palestine' in designs. Canva apologized for the error that reveals biases in generative AI systems.

title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
summary: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.

bajada_en: Choco used OpenAI APIs to automate and optimize food distribution. The use case demonstrates real-world impact of AI agents in streamlining logistics operations.
